screenshots.headline: Pick your pilot
screenshots.caption: Fast local battles start with a clean space-themed setup.

screenshots.headline: Host nearby rivals
screenshots.caption: Create a local match, manage players and configure the campaign.

screenshots.headline: Train against AI pilots
screenshots.caption: Start a solo campaign with adjustable opponents and difficulty.

screenshots.headline: Trail, trap and blast
screenshots.caption: Dodge, shoot, drop obstacles and survive chaotic arena combat.

shortDescription: Fast local multiplayer space combat with trails, weapons, custom arenas and single-player AI campaigns.
betaNotice: Rocket Rivals is currently a pre-release beta build.
